title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: A creator compared Claude Code's performance on a coding task against their own work, finding the AI outperformed them. The video documents the experiment setup, workflow challenges, terminal interactions, and results while raising questions about AI-driven job replacement.
